items.name: Azure Periastron Alpha
items.description: Only when two stars are at their closest point, can the material for this sword be collected, so they are extremely rare, and depending on which stars are orbiting one another they are different colors.  One thing is sure, they spell doom for anyone who comes near. First in a series!
